reviews.review_description: Will not accept my email. I removed the app, asked for refund, and installed again. Very disappointing.

Why do I need to enter an e-mail adres? 
It was almost impossible to enter the e-mail adres, the keyboard was so close to my body and I couldnt move it, and it kept registering the wrong letters
Then I finally entered the church, I was so close to the table with the bible that I was almost inside the table, and in the left I couldnt click any of the menu items. 
That’s as far as I got

reviews.review_title: There is no content in this app.
reviews.review_description: There's nothing in there. Just music. I'm guessing it's due to being a work in progress. Yet as of right now it does not deliver on the description.

reviews.review_title: A Thoughtful Exploration of VR Church
reviews.review_description: I recently tried out the new VR church app on Meta Quest, and it offers an intriguing experience. The virtual church environment is immersive, complete with serene surroundings and soothing music. Navigating through passages of the Bible felt realistic, and the option to pray in a virtual setting was unique. It's a thoughtful tool for those seeking spiritual reflection in a new format. Worth exploring if you're curious about blending technology with religious practice.
